<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current segmentation
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']} children={n['children']}")
    # Print boundary to locate
    b = n['boundary']
    if len(b) >= 2:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"    rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check what the 84-pixel block looks like now
print("\nAdjacency list:", seg['adjacency_list'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
